---
title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Primer
author: CryptoWeekly
date: 2024-02-27
description: Quantum computers threaten current cryptographic standards
tags: ["#quantum", "#cryptography"]
---
Quantum computers threaten current cryptographic standards. NIST has finalized its first set of post-quantum algorithms.

**The finalists:**
- CRYSTALS-Kyber for key encapsulation
- CRYSTALS-Dilithium for digital signatures
- SPHINCS+ as a hash-based signature backup

Start planning your migration now.
